name: Dash Documentation MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Dash MCP server from Kapeli enabling AI agents to search and access Dash documentation — querying offline API documentation across 200+ languages and frameworks, retrieving docsets for libraries and SDKs, and integrating Dash's comprehensive offline documentation search into agent-driven code assistance and documentation lookup workflows.
use_cases: Searching API documentation for any supported language from code generation agents
Looking up SDK method signatures and parameters from code review agents
Retrieving library documentation for accuracy checking from code assistance agents
Querying framework-specific documentation from debugging agents
Accessing offline docs without internet dependency from air-gapped environment agents
Finding code examples from documentation from development assistance agents
not_for: Teams not using Dash (macOS-only app; this MCP requires local Dash installation)
Linux or Windows environments (Dash is macOS-only)
Web-based documentation lookup (Dash works with locally downloaded docsets)
best_when: An agent needs to search local API documentation across multiple technologies simultaneously — for code generation, SDK lookup, or multi-technology documentation reference.
avoid_when: You're on Linux/Windows — Dash is macOS-only. Also avoid if you prefer web-based doc lookup or need docs for technologies not in Dash's docset library.

auth.notes: No authentication — communicates with local Dash app via URL scheme. Requires Dash to be running and properly licensed. Access controlled by local process permissions.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Dash free trial available with nag screen; full license one-time purchase
pricing.paid_tiers: Dash app: $29.99 one-time or Setapp subscription
pricing.notes: Dash app has a free trial. Full license is one-time purchase ($29.99) or via Setapp. MCP server itself is open source and free. macOS only.

known_agent_gotchas: Requires Dash app to be running on macOS — will fail if Dash is not open
Only searches docsets that have been downloaded in Dash — not all docs are available offline
macOS-only — cannot be used on Linux or Windows development environments
Dash must be properly licensed for full functionality (free trial shows nag screens)
Search quality depends on Dash docset version — may not have latest API changes
Official Kapeli MCP — well-maintained and directly integrated with Dash app
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local tool — no external network calls for search. Docs stored locally. No secrets required. Requires Dash app license for full use. macOS process permissions govern access.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local tool. No external auth or network. No secrets required. Reads locally downloaded documentation only. Official Kapeli MCP server.
